skills.name: open-app
skills.description: Open the Weight Forecast application (signed-in area) in the user's browser to start tracking weight or view their forecast.

skills.name: list-articles
skills.description: List Weight Forecast blog articles (title, slug, date, category, excerpt) for agent-assisted content discovery.

skills.name: read-article
skills.description: Return the full text of a Weight Forecast blog article by slug, including title, date, category, reading time and body.
